creator: ernst@heinz.jollem.com
text:
The Linux JDK 1.3.0 needs a few tweaks. IMHO it would be better if the JVM
config file would be changed to default to the "classic" VM, instead of the
HotSpot client VM. There are known problems with the latter.

Second suggested improvement is commenting out the references to the Adobe
symbol fonts in the font.properties file. These fonts are usually not
available. If they're not available, they cause AWT to take a few more seconds
(!) to start up on a P2-400 system.

Fix: Here are 2 diff files, one for jvm.cfg and one for font.properties. Both
reside in the jre/lib/ directory.
